social_security_taxable_examples.name: MFJ below provisional threshold
social_security_taxable_examples.source_note: IRS Pub. 915 style provisional income: other income + 1/2 Social Security is below the married filing jointly base amount.

social_security_taxable_examples.name: MFJ above second threshold
social_security_taxable_examples.source_note: IRS Pub. 915 style worksheet: 85% phase-in above $44,000 with the lower-tier inclusion amount.

social_security_taxable_examples.name: Single above second threshold
social_security_taxable_examples.source_note: IRS Pub. 915 style worksheet for single filer above the second provisional income base amount.
